name: Spinach Cream Cheese Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach and drain thoroughly, squeezing out excess water.
2. Mix the drained spinach with the cream cheese.
3. Beat the eggs, salt, and pepper, then add them to the spinach mixture along with the Parmesan cheese.
4. Place the mixture in a 9-inch pie pan.
5. Beat 2 eggs and oil separately.
6. Pour the beaten eggs and oil over the top of the spinach mixture.
7. Bake in a 375-degree oven for 30-35 minutes.
8. Slice and serve.
